pending.body: Update `tests/cli.rs:12722-12859`. The ignored `cli_run_resume_recovers_stale_daemon_owned_running_and_reclaims_worktree_lock` scenario still asserts the pre-`rlm.5` behavior (resume succeeds after reclaiming a stale daemon worktree lease), but the current implementation now intentionally fails closed when worktree/lease cleanup cannot be positively proven. Running the ignored test now fails with `lease cleanup partially failed ...`, so the only CLI end-to-end coverage for stale daemon worktree-owner recovery is stale and contradicts the shipped contract. Replace it with a real-worktree success case, or rewrite it to assert the new partial-cleanup failure behavior.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 15 -> Plan and Implement
